subject: Warp Out of Memory Error During Full Tomogram Reconstruction
body:
Hello, 

I'm currently working with the EMPIAR-10164 5 series tilt-set and I'm at 
the reconstruct full tomograms stage. I'm trying to export the tomograms at 
bin2 (pixel size 2.7A), but I keep getting a System.OutOfMemoryException. I 
attached the error written into the lastcrash.txt as an image in this 
posting. 

I did some digging around on this forum and couldn't find an answer to my 
problem (I might have missed it if it has been previously posted) and I saw 
that in the TeamTomo tutorial, there were issues reconstructing at 1.35A 
for subtomograms. 

I have also attached the input used in the reconstruct full tomograms 
parameters and the input parameters for warp (pixel size, binning, 
dimensions). Let me know if there are any issues with the files! 

The computer I'm running on is a Windows 10 machine wtih a 64 GB ram and 
has the following processor: Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 6136 CPU @ 3.00Ghz 2.99 
GHz (2 processors). There is also a NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080 GPU in the 
machine. 

Has anyone ran into this issue before and/or know how to get around it? I 
greatly appreciate it! 

Thanks! 
Rose
